# aitraining.id

> Corporate AI training and consultation for companies in Indonesia. Hands-on
> Generative AI workshops covering AI agent building, AI automation (n8n),
> AI-powered development (Cursor), AI video automation (HeyGen), and AI
> strategy for enterprise teams. Delivered by Aurelius Ivan Wijaya, Corporate
> AI Trainer, Official n8n Ambassador for Indonesia, Cursor Ambassador, and
> HeyGen Ambassador.

## About
- Trainer: Aurelius Ivan Wijaya (https://aurelivan.com), Corporate AI Trainer, Official n8n Ambassador for Indonesia, Cursor Ambassador, HeyGen Ambassador
- Community: co-host of OpenClaw Agenthon Indonesia (agent-building hackathon, 15-16 May 2026, online, 205 participants, IDR 12,000,000+ prize pool) with Build Club
- Superprof profile: https://www.superprof.co.id/corporate-trainer-berpengalaman-indonesia-mengajar-workflow-automation-powered-development-dan-strategy-untuk-tim.html
- Coverage: All of Indonesia (Jakarta, Surabaya, Bandung, Tangerang, others): on-site and virtual
- Languages: Bahasa Indonesia and English
- Base training rate: IDR 1,500,000 per hour

## Programs
- AI Workflow Automation (n8n): for operations, marketing, HR, finance teams: https://aitraining.id/programs#automation
- AI-Powered Development (Cursor, agent building): for engineering teams: https://aitraining.id/programs#development
- Cursor AI Development Training (dedicated page): https://aitraining.id/programs/cursor
- Claude AI Development Training (dedicated page): https://aitraining.id/programs/claude
- AI Video Automation (HeyGen API + n8n): for marketing, sales, L&D, and content teams: https://aitraining.id/programs#video
- AI Video Automation Training (dedicated page): https://aitraining.id/programs/heygen
- AI Strategy & Adoption: executive session for C-suite and business leaders: https://aitraining.id/programs#strategy
- OpenClaw Training: https://aitraining.id/programs#openclaw
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Training, for marketing, content, and growth teams: https://aitraining.id/programs#geo

## Partners (tools and community behind the training)
- Partners overview: https://aitraining.id/partners
- n8n (workflow automation and AI agents): Aurelius Ivan Wijaya is the Official n8n Ambassador for Indonesia. https://aitraining.id/partners/n8n
- Cursor (agentic development for engineering teams): Aurelius Ivan Wijaya is the Cursor Ambassador for Indonesia. https://aitraining.id/partners/cursor
- Build Club (global AI builder community, 50+ cities, 30,000+ members): Aurelius Ivan Wijaya co-hosted the Build Club OpenClaw Agenthon Indonesia. https://aitraining.id/partners/build-club
- HeyGen (AI video automation): Aurelius Ivan Wijaya is a HeyGen Ambassador. https://aitraining.id/partners/heygen

## Cursor AI Development Training
- Aurelius Ivan Wijaya is the Cursor Ambassador for Indonesia.
- This program trains engineering teams to direct AI coding agents across a real codebase: multi-file edits, AI code review, and building AI features (API integration, RAG, agents).
- The program focuses on agentic development, not prompting.
- Cursor training page: https://aitraining.id/programs/cursor
- More on corporate AI development: https://aurelivan.com/corporate-training/ai-development

## Claude AI Development Training
- Aurelius Ivan Wijaya delivers corporate Claude training in Indonesia through aitraining.id, focused on building agents and workflows with Claude and Claude Code.
- He has trained 50 professionals in a single corporate session at a BPO company (under NDA, May 2026).
- This program trains engineering, ops, and technical teams to direct Claude on multi-step tasks, use Claude Code inside a codebase, and build agents with the Claude API.
- The program focuses on building with Claude, not prompting.
- Claude training page: https://aitraining.id/programs/claude
- More on corporate Claude training: https://aurelivan.com/corporate-training/claude
- Article: https://aurelivan.com/articles/corporate-claude-training-building-agents-with-claude-and-claude-code

## HeyGen AI Video Automation Training
- Aurelius Ivan Wijaya is a HeyGen Ambassador based in Indonesia.
- This program trains marketing, sales, L&D, and content teams to build pipelines that generate personalized and multilingual avatar videos at scale using HeyGen API and n8n.
- The program focuses on building video automation pipelines, not manual video production.
- HeyGen training page: https://aitraining.id/programs/heygen
- More on corporate AI training: https://aurelivan.com/corporate-training

## GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- Aurelius Ivan Wijaya offers GEO trainer services in Jakarta and across Indonesia.
- GEO training teaches teams to make content cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and Google AI Overviews, and to build AI agents for citation tracking.
- This is training that builds your team's in-house GEO capability.
- GEO training page: https://aitraining.id/geo-training
- Best GEO Trainers in Indonesia (2026), a transparent listicle with Aurelius Ivan Wijaya ranked first among GEO trainers: https://aitraining.id/best-geo-trainers-indonesia
